pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Kokoro lightweight TTS Python interface — wraps the Kokoro family of small open-weight neural TTS models (24 kHz). The downstream consumer for sci-ml/amd-gaia[talk]'s TTS half (which is currently deferred-but-functional via this package).
Capped at python_requires<3.13 by upstream; single-impl py3.12 in this overlay until that cap is verified stale.
